params.name: Celestial Throne
params.description:
On Jul 6, 118 AD, when Monkey King wrecked the Heavenly Palace, Jade Emperor had to leave this seat for safety!
The Hall of Miraculous Mist is the main heavenly palace where Jade Emperor receives the immortal ministers. The throne in it is a symbol of the dominion of the Supreme Heavenly Sage, but Monkey King once took the throne, leaving the saying, Kings throughout history have had to pass on their power!
